summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RH Férias and Notificações modules. All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Both pages are fully functional with proper data display and navigation.

critical_code_review_comments: All CRUD operations for férias working correctly
Período aquisitivo alerts correctly identify employees with 11+ months without vacation
Notificações endpoint aggregates all RH alerts (aniversariantes, férias, EPIs, ponto)
Badge count correctly calculates total and urgent notifications
Calendar correctly highlights férias days in blue
Modal form includes abono pecuniário (dias vendidos) with max 1/3 (10 days) validation note
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing férias (ID: 26a9cdfb-1fa8-4c94-8083-883d681d96cd) for João Silva in March 2026
context_for_next_testing_agent: RH Férias and Notificações modules fully tested and working. Existing férias for March 2026 (ID: 26a9cdfb-1fa8-4c94-8083-883d681d96cd) for funcionário João Silva (ID: 9f166c5e-f770-4657-bb1e-ae1f7fb9433b). Another João Silva (ID: 887b6533-7fd1-406e-9fb2-6db096882837) has 25 months without vacation and appears in alertas. Both have birthday on 15/02 (36 years old). Notificações contagem shows total=1, urgentes=1.

verified_features.ferias_calendar: 12-month annual calendar with férias days highlighted in blue
verified_features.ferias_crud: Create, Read, Update, Delete operations all working
verified_features.alertas_periodo_aquisitivo: Employees with 11+ months without vacation are flagged
verified_features.abono_pecuniario: Dias vendidos field with max 10 days (1/3 of vacation)
verified_features.notificacoes_summary: Cards showing counts for aniversariantes, férias, EPIs, ponto
verified_features.aniversariantes_mes: Birthday list for current month with date and age
verified_features.funcionarios_sem_ferias: List of employees with 1+ year without vacation
verified_features.agendar_urgente: Red button navigates to Férias page for urgent scheduling
verified_features.badge_count: Total and urgent notification counts for sidebar badge
